testcase.classname: VehicleHub API GET /api/health returns 200 with status, timestamp, and version

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles returns list
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles returns list

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles returns 503 when vehicle table is missing
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles returns 503 when vehicle table is missing

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles/:id returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles/:id returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles/:id returns vehicle when found
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles GET /api/vehicles/:id returns vehicle when found

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles POST /api/vehicles creates vehicle
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles POST /api/vehicles creates vehicle

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Vehicles PUT /api/vehicles/:id returns 404 when not found
testcase.name: VehicleHub API Vehicles PUT /api/vehicles/:id returns 404 when not found

testcase.classname: VehicleHub API Service types GET /api/service-types returns list
